summary: Backend-only validation completed for Paw. Requested portable harness CLI commands, Node 22.19 build, and targeted Paw regression tests all passed. No live MiniMax key usage was performed in this iteration.
action_items: No blocking defects found in requested backend scope.
Optional: keep generate-models modularized over time to reduce risk in future provider metadata updates.
critical_code_review_comments: packages/ai/scripts/generate-models.ts is very large (>700 lines) and concentrated with provider-specific branches; split by provider families to reduce regression risk.
packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts is intentionally generated but very large; keep generation deterministic and avoid manual edits.
seed_data_creation: Created isolated temporary DB at /tmp/paw-harness-audit/harness.db for audit/score validation; no persistent repo data mutation required.
test_credentials: Present: /app/memory/test_credentials.md (no auth credentials required for this scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: scripts/bin/harness-cli --version, query stats, audit, propose, score-trace, score-context, tool register/check/remove, intervention add; npx -y node@22.19.0 --run build; vitest run for minimax-m3 + paw-build-command + paw-three-repo-validation. Also confirmed no Paw source dependency on /app/timetable and no explicit MiniMax API key literal under /app/Paw or /app/memory (excluding node_modules).
rca of the issue: No failures reproduced in requested scope. Portable CLI behavior aligns with root-cause mitigation via scripts/bin/harness-cli Node 22.19 fallback path.
